name: Knowledge Context Loader
description: A deterministic knowledge-base retriever that turns search_knowledge results into an auditable context_package with source refs, retrieval metadata, budget metadata, and warnings.

inputSchema.name: Query
inputSchema.description: Search query for the knowledge base.

inputSchema.name: Knowledge Base
inputSchema.description: Optional knowledge base id. Empty uses the default imported knowledge base.

inputSchema.name: Limit
inputSchema.description: Maximum number of knowledge chunks to include.

inputSchema.name: Metadata Filter
inputSchema.description: Optional search_knowledge metadata filter, such as source_path_prefix, source_kind, or section.

outputSchema.name: Knowledge Context Report
outputSchema.description: Search query, knowledge base, budget, source refs, retrieval metadata, and warnings.
